svg.title: CloudStub system architecture
svg.desc: Four-layer structural diagram: developer test suite at top, CloudStub core engine, pluggable service modules, and WireMock driver at the bottom.

g.text: Uses AWS SDK v2 — no code changes required

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the cloudstub-sqs module')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the cloudstub-s3 module')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the cloudstub-secretsmanager module')

g.text: Request matching · Handlebars templating · ID echo · Fully encapsulated
